concerns: Python sandboxing has inherent limitations — recommend container-level isolation as default
Market sizing: need to validate enterprise willingness to pay for agent governance tools
Audit logging must be tamper-proof for compliance use cases
recommendations: Use Bubblewrap or Docker-based isolation instead of pure Python sandboxing
Start with CI/CD integration as entry point (lower friction than IDE plugins)
Offer free tier for open-source teams to drive adoption
quality_assessment.overall_verdict: PROCEED with noted caveats on sandboxing approach
